summary: Saturday — no scheduled meetings, weekend follow-ups active. CIEE partnership advanced Friday evening: Pier Pennoyer confirmed CIEE staffer Jessica Dubra is on-ground in Indonesia and proposes a next-week meeting tied to the US Consulate J-1 initiative. Alliance Abroad 2026 Intern/Trainee Master Contract + DPP appendices remain pending CEO DocuSign with a Friday deadline. Carnival UK insurance-documentation review continues; RCCL delivered an updated CTI candidate manifest overnight.
